
# TrueProfit - Profit Tracking App for Shopify Businesses

> Structured reference file for LLMs with grouped context about TrueProfit's product features, use cases, partner programs, and blog content.

- [Homepage](https://trueprofit.io): Instantly track your Net Profit. Say goodbye to spreadsheet nightmares: Stay on top of your true business health with our Net Profit Analytics dashboard.

## Features

- [See Real-Time Profit & Expenses with TrueProfit's Dashboard](https://trueprofit.io/solutions/profit-dashboard): Easily track your financial health through TrueProfit's profit dashboard—real-time insights into net profit, ad spend, and business performance.
- [Profit and Loss (PNL) Analysis](https://trueprofit.io/solutions/pnl-profit-and-loss): Make informed business decisions with TrueProfit's comprehensive PNL analysis tools. Simplify financial insights for better profitability.
- [Streamlined Expense Tracking with TrueProfit](https://trueprofit.io/solutions/expense-tracking): Keep your business finances under control with TrueProfit's easy-to-use expense tracking software. Efficiently monitor and manage your spending.
- [Marketing Attribution Solutions](https://trueprofit.io/solutions/marketing-attribution): Get clear insights into your marketing efforts with TrueProfit's attribution solutions. Understand impact, optimize campaigns, and improve ROI.
- [Enhance Customer Lifetime Value with TrueProfit Insights](https://trueprofit.io/solutions/customer-lifetime-value): Unlock the full potential of your customers with TrueProfit's insights into customer lifetime value. Make informed decisions to boost loyalty and profits.
- [TrueProfit Integrations](https://trueprofit.io/solutions/integrations): Integrate TrueProfit with your favorite tools for a streamlined workflow. Explore our extensive integrations list for effortless efficiency.
- [Accurate & Real-time Net Profit Tracking For TikTok Shop](https://trueprofit.io/tiktok-shop-net-profit): Managing TikTok Shop net profit doesn't have to be complicated. TrueProfit delivers real-time profit tracking, ad spend sync, and clear analytics.

## Tools

- [Profit Margin Calculator](https://trueprofit.io/profit-margin-calculator): Calculate your net profit and margin without complex math. Just enter revenue and orders for automatic results—get instant insights to maximize profits.

## TrueProfit is for

- [Smart Net Profit Tracker Small Business Owners Need | TrueProfit](https://trueprofit.io/trueprofit-is-for/small-business-owners): TrueProfit offers small business owners powerful tools for financial management, marketing insights, and growth strategies.
- [Enterprise Growth With Net Profit Insights](https://trueprofit.io/trueprofit-is-for/enterprise): Scale and streamline your large business operations with TrueProfit's enterprise solutions.
- [Trusted Profit Reporting Tool For Marketing Agency](https://trueprofit.io/trueprofit-is-for/marketing-agency): Propel your marketing agency forward with TrueProfit. Leverage cutting-edge tools designed for growth, analytics, and client satisfaction.

## Use cases

- [Instantly Track Your Shopify Net Profit, Real-time P&L](https://trueprofit.io/usecase/profit-tracking): Track net profit and all metrics related to your business health in real-time. Say bye to spreadsheets nightmare.
- [Optimize Your Profits With Data-backed Insights](https://trueprofit.io/usecase/profit-optimization): Discover how TrueProfit optimization can enhance your earnings with strategic insights and tailored advice. Start maximizing your profits now!
- [Accurate Multi-platform Ad Tracking & Insights](https://trueprofit.io/usecase/ad-tracking): Elevate your ad campaigns with TrueProfit's precise ad tracking technology. Measure performance & ROI to optimize your advertising spend.

## Partner

- [TrueProfit Referral Program](https://trueprofit.io/partner/referral-program): Grow with TrueProfit by joining our referral program. Earn rewards for recommending us to help businesses maximize their profits.
- [TrueProfit Affiliate Program](https://trueprofit.io/partner/affiliate-program): Turn your influence into income! Join TrueProfit's Affiliate Program and earn commissions by helping eCommerce businesses track real profits.
- [Boost your business with our partnership program](https://trueprofit.io/partner/partnership-program): TrueProfit's partnership program welcomes agencies and SaaS partners to leverage strategic collaborations for accelerated eCommerce success.

## Comparison

- [TrueProfit vs Triple Whale: Which tool fits your business?](https://trueprofit.io/comparison/trueprofit-vs-triple-whale): Compare TrueProfit vs Triple Whale: See differences in pricing, analytics, features, and integrations to choose the right tool for your business.
- [TrueProfit vs BeProfit: Comparing Essential Functions](https://trueprofit.io/comparison/trueprofit-vs-beprofit): Find out the key differences between TrueProfit and BeProfit. Compare costs, features, analytics precision, and usability to make the right choice.
- [TrueProfit vs Lifetimely: Pricing, Analytics & More](https://trueprofit.io/comparison/trueprofit-vs-lifetimely): TrueProfit vs Lifetimely: Explore this detailed comparison of pricing, analytics features, ease of use, and integrations to decide what's best for you.

- [How Ecom KOLs Use TrueProfit for Growth](https://trueprofit.io/kols-on-trueprofit): See what top eCommerce KOLs say about TrueProfit—real insights, reviews, and expert opinions on net profit tracking and business growth.

## About

- [About TrueProfit](https://trueprofit.io/about-us): TrueProfit is a Net Profit Analytics platform for Shopify that aims at providing Shopify businesses with meaningful analysis among a clutter of information.
- [Contact TrueProfit Support](https://trueprofit.io/contact-us): Have questions or need assistance? Contact TrueProfit's dedicated support and sales team for fast, friendly, and professional help.
- [Learn About TrueProfit's Privacy Policy and GDPR Rules](https://trueprofit.io/privacy-policy): Understand your rights and how TrueProfit handles personal data collection, usage, sharing, and retention in compliance with GDPR and privacy standards.
- [TrueProfit Terms of Service](https://trueprofit.io/terms-services): Understand TrueProfit's terms of service to ensure a smooth and secure experience with us.
